[113:25]on Iran, they're also then going to apply crushing pressure on any other country and

[113:31]any other firm that does not stop buying and selling to Iran.

[113:55]is either to one force Iran to capitulate and make a deal, which I don't necessarily

[114:20]the Iranian government goes bankrupt. Their currency explodes.

[114:33]And what we're talking about is a form of soft regime change.

[114:52]It's something we tried to do to other countries

[114:55]and make no mistake about it.
